summary: Iteration 165: Category slug conflict sibling scope verification complete. Backend correctly enforces slug uniqueness at sibling (same parent_id) scope, not globally. DE/real_estate Wohnen hierarchy with Verkauf/Miete/Kurzzeitmiete L2 and 10 L3 categories each verified.
seed_data_creation: Test categories created and deleted during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Category slug conflict logic is correctly scoped to siblings (same parent_id). Same slug can exist under different parents (Verkauf/wohnung, Miete/wohnung, Kurzzeitmiete/wohnung all coexist). Edit operations work without false 409 when slug unchanged.

slug_sibling_scope.feature: Same slug different parents NO conflict
slug_sibling_scope.result: PASS - wohnung, haus, etc. exist under Verkauf, Miete, Kurzzeitmiete simultaneously

slug_conflict_same_parent.result: PASS - Creating duplicate wohnung under Verkauf returns 409 CATEGORY_SLUG_CONFLICT

update_to_sibling_slug.feature: Update slug to match sibling RETURNS 409
update_to_sibling_slug.result: PASS - Updating haus to wohnung under Verkauf returns 409

de_wohnen_hierarchy.result: PASS - Full hierarchy exists with 10+ L3 categories under each L2

edit_regression.feature: Category edit without slug change succeeds
edit_regression.result: PASS - No false 409 when editing without changing slug

error_format.feature: 409 error structure with error_code, field_name, conflict
error_format.result: PASS - CATEGORY_SLUG_CONFLICT error includes field_name='slug' and conflict details

admin_create_category.slug_conflict_check: Category.parent_id == (parent.id if parent else None) - checks only siblings

test_results.note: First run had 1 transient timeout error which passed on retry
